title: Junior Instructional Designer at CL Educate Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at CL Educate Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the CL Educate Digital Technologies family as a Instructional Designer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CL Educate Digital Technologies:
CL Educate Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate Digital Technologies!
